title: Front Office Manager - Goa Tourism Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Goa Tourism Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Goa Tourism Holdings Services in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Goa Tourism Holdings Services:
Goa Tourism Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goa Tourism Holdings Services!
